blocks.text: Bodø/Glimt host Sporting CP Wednesday — Norwegian club football's greatest night
🚴 Tirreno-Adriatico Stage 1 — Leknessund & Wærenskjold open Norway's spring campaign — 12:40
Wednesday is stacked: Man City at Real Madrid and Arsenal at Leverkusen are ★5 ties in their own right. But for Norwegian football, Aspmyra hosts its biggest club game ever.
⛳ THE PLAYERS Championship — Hovland & Reitan tee off at TPC Sawgrass — Thu 05:00
